name: Kyaromon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Puts all its strength into striking the opponent with its tail.

description: A Lesser Digimon that vigorously grew a tail. As it is brimming with curiosity, it takes an interest in anything, and has a habit of rushing for whatever caught its interest. The inside of its body has become mostly empty, and because it is elastic like a rubber ball, its " Shippo Swing ", in which it puts its strength into its tail and strikes, seems to have the force to blow away even a Child Digimon.
